title: Geofence
description: A virtual geographic boundary used to define service areas, restricted zones, or operational boundaries for mobility assets.

geofenceType.description: Type of geofence (e.g. SERVICE_AREA, RESTRICTED, SPEED_LIMIT)

geometry.description: GeoJSON geometry defining the geofence boundary

rules.description: Operational rules applied within this geofence

gps.description: GPS coordinates as a latitude,longitude string

geojson.description: GeoJSON geometry object representing this location
